llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Talent Acquisition Partner (Contract Role)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: Role Summary The Talent Acquisition Partner manages the full recruitment lifecycle from Job Requisition (JR) approval to candidate offer acceptance. This role acts as a strategic advisor to the business, partnering closely with hiring managers and HR stakeholders to ensure effective talent delivery. The TA Partner is responsible for developing sourcing strategies, managing candidate pipelines, and driving a seamless recruitment experience for both candidates and internal stakeholders. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities End-to-End Recruitment Management • Manage the complete hiring process from JR approval, sourcing, screening, interview scheduling, selection, to offer stage. • Build and maintain strong talent pipelines across assigned functions. • Ensure timely process progression while maintaining a high quality candidate experience. • Provide market insights, talent trends, and recommendations to hiring managers. Stakeholder Management • Act as a trusted advisor to Hiring Managers, HR Business Partners, Country Heads, and functional leaders. • Facilitate alignment discussions on hiring needs, role requirements, and selection criteria. • Conduct regular hiring updates and performance discussions with business stakeholders. • Manage expectations on hiring timelines, candidate availability, and recruitment challenges. Sourcing Strategy Execution • Develop and execute sourcing strategies using job portals, networks, referrals, and targeted outreach. • Leverage recruitment tools and platforms to identify and engage relevant talent. • Promote employer brand through candidate engagement and consistent communication. Candidate Assessment Selection • Conduct initial screening and evaluate candidates’ skills, experience, and cultural fit. • Coordinate interviews with relevant stakeholders and ensure structured and fair evaluation processes. • Guide stakeholders in decision making with candidate insights and interview feedback. Communications Cross-Functional Collaboration • Serve as the communication link between candidates, HRBP, Country Heads, Talent Teams, and other internal partners. • Ensure smooth coordination of interviews, feedback loops, and offer negotiations. • Collaborate with Compensation Benefits, HRIS, and Finance teams for accurate and timely hiring data. Process Excellence Compliance • Ensure recruitment activities comply with company policies and governance standards. • Maintain data accuracy in recruitment systems and trackers...
